content: Excited to welcome Dr. Yuyan (Yolanda) Chen from Fudan University as our new postdoc fellow! 🎉 She’s bringing her large model and AI magic to push new frontiers in computational pathology and spatial biology. Welcome, Dr. Chen! 🚀
title: Welcome New Member

content: 🌟 Exciting news! Dr. Guangyu Wang has been invited to serve as a grant reviewer in the NIH Biotechnology study section. This is a wonderful recognition of Dr. Wang’s leadership and impact in the scientific community - congratulations on this honor!
title: Grant Reviewer Invitation

content: Our Paper "Thor: a platform for cell-level investigation of spatial transcriptomics and histology" was accepted in Nature Communications. Way to go Weiqing and Pengzhi!!! 🎉🧬
title: Paper Accepted in Nature Communications

content: We are thrilled to share that Dr. Shengyu Li has been appointed as a Principal Investigator! Congratulations, Dr. Shengyu Li, on this exciting new chapter in your scientific journey!
title: New Principal Investigator

content: We are pleased to announce that Dr. Qing Li from UCAS and CUPT is joining our team as a postdoctoral fellow! Welcome, Dr. Qing Li!!!
title: Welcome New Member

content: Our Paper "A visual–omics foundation model to bridge histopathology image with transcriptomics" was accepted in Nature Method. Way to go Weiqing and Pengzhi!!! 🎉🧬
title: Paper Accepted in Nature Methods

content: We are pleased to announce that Dr. Jian Sang from NIH is joining our team as a Research Associate! Welcome, Dr. Jian Sang!!!
title: Welcome New Member

content: We are welcoming our new PhD student, Xiaohan (Hannah) Zhao, from the Weill Cornell PBSB program to our lab! Looking forward to all the great science ahead!
title: Welcome New Student

content: We are pleased to announce that Dr. Yiwei Xiao from Peking University is joining our team as a postdoctoral fellow! Welcome, Dr. Yiwei Xiao!!!
title: Welcome New Member

content: Our collaboration paper was accepted in Nature Metabolism! Congratulations to Shengyu!
title: Paper Accepted in Nature Metabolism

content: Our collaboration paper was accepted in Circulation Research!
title: Paper Accepted in Circulation Research

content: Guangyu becomes a youth editor in Genomics, Proteomics & Bioinformatics (IF=8.9, Q1).
title: Editorial Board
